query_normalized: investigating the relationship between cosmic ray anisotropy and solar cycle variations physics
rationale: The paper investigates solar modulation of galactic cosmic rays across solar cycle phases, directly studying how solar‑cycle variations affect a cosmic‑ray observable (intensity). This addresses the same underlying mechanism—solar‑cycle–driven modulation of cosmic rays—that the user’s question concerns (anisotropy), satisfying inclusion criterion (a) (same‑mechanism evidence).
